breakfast.name: Protein Power Smoothie
breakfast.instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Add ice for thickness.

breakfast.name: Avocado Egg Toast
breakfast.instructions: Toast bread, mash avocado, poach eggs, assemble with tomatoes.

lunch.name: Grilled Chicken Salad
lunch.instructions: Grill chicken, chop veggies, toss with oil and lemon.

lunch.name: Quinoa Veggie Bowl
lunch.instructions: Cook quinoa, steam veggies, mix with chickpeas and dressing.

dinner.name: Salmon with Sweet Potato
dinner.instructions: Bake salmon at 200°C for 15min, roast sweet potato and asparagus.

dinner.name: Beef Stir Fry
dinner.instructions: Stir fry beef and veggies, serve over cooked rice.

snacks.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
snacks.instructions: Layer yogurt, berries, and almonds in a glass.

snacks.name: Apple with Peanut Butter
snacks.instructions: Slice apple and spread with peanut butter.
